metadata.description: Opinionated Claude Code workflow skills for disciplined planning, proof-based review, and clean Conventional Commits.

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Eight workflow skills: replan (iterative planning), review and review-staged (proof-based code review), gitplan and stage (disciplined Conventional-Commit staging), and the Technical Project Plan workflow (tpp, handoff, tpp-orchestrate — multi-session plan files with serial orchestration, TDD subagents, and dual vetted reviews).
